1010_hardware_check.name: tc_server_boot_mode_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check server boot mode.


                ...  If  /sys/firmware/efi directory exists then boot mode is UEFI.


                ...  Othervise it's BIOS (Legacy).

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_server_boot_device_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check server boot device by RedFish or efibootmgr.
                ...  Order must be HDD, Network

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_maintenance_mode_check_from_cluster_nodes
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check maintenance mode status from Cluster Nodes.


                ...  In NCS22 Mainentenance flag is TRUE and 22.7 onwards FALSE as default value.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_maintenance_mode_check_from_central_manager_nodes
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check maintenance mode status from Central Manager nodes.


                ...  In NCS22 Mainentenance flag is TRUE and 22.7 onwards FALSE as default value.

1010_hardware_check.documentation: Server bmc version is checked.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_server_bios_version_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation: Server bios version is checked.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_check_server_ipmi_ip_source
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Comparing that IPMI IP source is "Static" as a default.


                ...  If it's DHCP use robot flag -v T_IPMI_IP_SOURCE:DHCP.


                ...  Or add ${T_IPMI_IP_SOURCE} variable to SUT file of TM/git envsetup.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_storage_megaraid_disk_version_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks physical storage node MegaRAID disk versions.
                ...  Drive /c0/e73/s14 Device attributes :
                ...  Model Number = SAMSUNG MZ7KM960HMJP-00005
                ...  Firmware Revision = GXM5304Q

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_node_nvme_disk_version_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks node nvme disk versions.
                ...  /dev/nvme0n1     18391EDD8B23         Micron_9200_MTFDHAL1T6TCU
                ...  frs1 : 0x3050383030313031 (101008P0)
                ...

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_physical_storage_node_disk_temperatures
1010_hardware_check.documentation: Checks physical storage node disk temperatures.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_megaraid_bios_fw_and_fw_build_versions
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Compare MegaRAID FW, FW Package and BIOS versions.
                ...  Must be the same on each BM storage node.
                ...
                ...  BIOS Version = 7.09.02.0_0x07090300
                ...  FW Package Build = 50.9.0-2725
                ...  FW Version = 5.090.00-2532
                ...  RM20 server type AR-SER1W-C

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_jbod45_exapander_fw_versions
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Reads JBOD45 exapander FW versions and copapares
                ...  that those are the same on each node.
                ...  Nokia     AO-JBOD45-A       0401
                ...
                ...

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_storage_megaraid_disk_status_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks physical storage node MegaRAID disk statuses.
                ...  Must be "Onln" and the same amount on each storage node.
                ...  Drive /c0/e134/s1 :
                ...  134:1     5 Onln   1 893.75 GB SATA SSD N   N  512B VK000960GWTTB U  -
                ...

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_nic_firmware_version_driver_name_and_driver_version_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
All nic related info such as nic names, nic fw versions, nic drivers and nic driver versions are checked in all baremetal servers in a cluster.
    ...  Nic fw and driver related data is compared so that each nic type has the same information.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_nic_firmware_version_driver_name_and_driver_version_check_central_nodes
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
All nic related info such as nic names, nic fw versions, nic drivers and nic driver versions are checked in all baremetal servers of


    ...  Central Site nodes.


    ...  Nic fw and driver related data is compared so that each nic type has the same information.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_nic_interface_state_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation: Check that all valid nic interfaces are UP in all baremetal servers in a cluster.

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_nic_interface_state_check_central_nodes
1010_hardware_check.documentation: Check that all valid nic interfaces are UP in all baremetal servers of all Central Site Nodes.\n\n

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_hpe_smart_array_storage_disk_status_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks HPE G10 physical storage node Smart Array disk statuses.
                ...  Must be "OK" and the same amount on each storage node.
                ...  HPE Smart Array P816i-a SR Gen10 in Slot 0 (Embedded)
                ...  physicaldrive 1I:3:1 (port 1I:box 3:bay 1, 3.8 TB): OK
                ...

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_hpe_smart_array_storage_disk_fw_version_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks physical storage node HPE Smart Array disk versions.
                ...  Firmware Revision: HPG6
                ...  Model: ATA     MK003840GWHTE
                ...  ssacli ctrl slot=0 physicaldrive 1I:3:1 show detail

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_dell_megaraid_storage_disk_version_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks physical storage node MegaRAID disk versions.
                ...  /dev/bus/17 -d megaraid,0 # /dev/bus/17 [megaraid_disk_00], SCSI device
                ...  /dev/bus/17 -d megaraid,1 # /dev/bus/17 [megaraid_disk_01], SCSI device
                ...  Model Number = SAMSUNG MZ7KM960HMJP-00005
                ...  Firmware Revision = GXM5304Q

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_dell_megaraid_storage_disk_status_check
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Checks Dell physical storage node MegaRAID disk status.
                ...  Self test must be passed
                ...

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_dellboss_physical_disk_status
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check DELLBOSS physical disk smart statuses
                  ...  UNDER CONTRUCTION !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_sel_list
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check server ipmitool sel list = HW alarm log.


                ...  02.03.2022  -MB- ======>


                ...  In OE19 HW sel list may not have any "Asserted" events.


                ...  Added check that ipmi sel command works (sel get) before sel list command.


                ...  It reads the first sel log event. If sel get returns rc=1 case fails.


                ...  Added also "| grep Asserted || true" then rc is "0" always.


                ...  <=====  02.03.2022  -MB-

1010_hardware_check.name: tc_sdr_list
1010_hardware_check.documentation:
Check server ipmitool sdr list = Sensor Data Record.
                ...

1010_hardware_check.documentation: Check cluster status after the case

Review of NCS Cluster Replace Master operation after execution
    ...              This step required due to NCSTA-1826 Replace "NotReady" Master node - Infra HC
    ...              The log indicates that there were 2 infra HC done during the operation
    ...              Note: the Replace Master operation was run with '"ignore_first_healthcheck": false'
    ...              First one is at the beginning of the operation in which the HC indicates that there is an issue with the master node in step 3, but the HC is not failing the operation.
    ...              A second HC (close to the end of the operation) in which the HC is passing with no errors.

7100_check_ceph_log_file_rotation.name: check_the_rotation_of_ceph_log_files
7100_check_ceph_log_file_rotation.documentation:
The existence and right creation time of gzipped (gz) ceph log rotation -files ceph-mon.log, ceph-mds.log, ceph-mgr.log, ceph-rgw.log and ceph.ods are checked
     ...  Time difference between current time and latest gzipped file should not be more than 48h. Ideal is to have it made in 27h calculated from current time.
     ...  Compressed file made in less than 27h is consired as OK.
     ...  Compressed file made between 27h to 48h is consired as To be monitored.
     ...  Compressed file made after 48h is consired as Failure.

7215_Ceph_Balancing_Improvement.name: check_ceph_subtree_limit_type
7215_Ceph_Balancing_Improvement.documentation:
Check ceph subtree limit type
    ...              Affecting how the cepf rebalancing is behave
    ...              Ceph rebalancing option
    ...              In case of host: if all OSDs of a host get down, Ceph will not automatically mark out these OSDs and rebalancing will not start.
    ...              In case of rack: if all OSDs of a rack get down, Ceph will not automatically mark out these OSDs and rebalancing will not start.
    ...              In case of root: if all OSDs of a host or rack fail, Ceph will automatically mark out these OSDs and start rebalancing.
    ...              Note: Rack has meaning only in rack aware setup. On non rack aware setup, rack and root behave the same.

Printout the list of founded ipmi ips

                ...

0005_sut_connection_test.documentation:
Check that DNS connection is working with "dig" command.


                ...  The dig command in Linux is used to gather DNS information. It stands for Domain Information Groper.

0005_sut_connection_test.documentation: Check that NTP is enabled and synchronized on cluster nodes.\n\n

0005_sut_connection_test.name: tc_test_fileserver_login

Check fileserver login by reading diretory structure


                ...  with curl command.


                ...  The HTTP 200 OK success status response code indicates that the request has succeeded.


                ...  Regexp from std_out "200 OK"


                ...  Also 301 and 302 are acceptable
